commands.repair_reason: Needs maintainer/author revision rather than an automated repair because the idempotency commit semantics, privacy-safe key design, and stale queue-file conflict should be decided and ported together.; Needs attention: The diff introduces a concrete privacy regression by persisting and logging raw outbound content, recipient identifiers, and platform message IDs as idempotency keys.; Review finding: [P1] Hash idempo... (sha=cf762948be54c4cba49375720ef9f6d2461ab0c7)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a persistent outbound dedupe ledger and deterministic idempotency keys for Discord-originated and tool-driven WhatsApp sends, threading the key through follow-up routing, message sends, delivery queue recovery, and tests.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main writes a delivery queue entry before sending, acks it only after delivery returns, and recovery replays pending entries with skipQueue. I did not run a live WhatsApp crash/restart test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/author revision rather than an automated repair because the idempotency commit semantics, privacy-safe key design, and stale queue-file conflict should be decided and ported together.

target.title: fix(outbound): anti-duplication layer for Discord→WhatsApp #wa-aprovacoes forum replies
target.author: pedrosbraga
